text.title: lint-megalinter-polyglot Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for lint-megalinter-polyglot as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running both MegaLinter and the underlying native tool (e.g., ruff) twice in the same CI workflow because "the agent fixes faster from the SARIF".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: MegaLinter already runs ruff inside; the duplicate run wastes CI minutes and produces two reports the agent has to reconcile. Use the SARIF feed only.

failure-mode.description: Disabling individual linters inside the default image to "save time" instead of switching to a flavor.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Disabled linters still ship in the image; pull time is unchanged. Only a flavor changes the image.
